ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Deepak Nitrite Limited's wholly-owned subsidiary, Deepak Phenolics Limited, has infused ₹120 Crores into another wholly-owned subsidiary, Deepak Chem Tech Limited (DCTL), by subscribing to 9% Optionally Convertible Redeemable Preference Shares. This related-party transaction, performed at par, aims to strengthen DCTL's capital base and fund its ongoing capital-intensive projects, representing an internal reallocation of capital without altering Deepak Nitrite's ultimate beneficial ownership. A point of note is DCTL's significant capital base relative to its current low turnover (₹172.23 Crores in FY26), indicating a substantial investment phase for future growth.
